query:
-- 查看partner_cities中的cityId
SELECT 'PARTNER_CITIES' as source, pc.cityId, pc.partnerId, pc.contractStatus
FROM partner_cities pc
WHERE pc.partnerId = 30002

UNION ALL

-- 查看cities表中的所有记录
SELECT 'CITIES' as source, c.id as cityId, c.name as partnerId, NULL as contractStatus
FROM cities c
ORDER BY source, cityId;
